stories.headline: Russia launches nearly 300 drones at Ukraine as 528 bodies of Ukrainian soldiers are returned

stories.headline: Returning from China, Trump is Ambiguous Over Taiwan
stories.summary: President Donald Trump said he made no commitment to Chinese President Xi Jinping over Taiwan, and would make a decision soon over a planned $14 billion arms deal with the island. Bloomberg White House Correspondent Courtney Subramanian and Reporter Michelle Kaske joined Christina Ruffini and David Gura this morning on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss the summit’s deals, sticking points and unfinished business. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.headline: Latvia’s President Nominates Kulbergs to Form New Government
stories.summary: Latvia’s President Edgars Rinkevics nominated Andris Kulbergs of the United List party to form a new government after Prime Minister Evika Silina resigned on Thursday following a row over how the armed forces handled a drone incursion last week.
